title: the_broken_rpg
description: A horror rpg experience using The Broken Script
body:
**The Broken RPG is a horror modpack using The Broken Script and The Broken Script: BLACKOUT to create a "cursed rpg creepypasta".**
**The mods in this pack make the game feel like an rpg adventure, while not straying too far from the vanilla experience of Minecraft**

**Explore:**
Various mods adding tons of new structures to The Overworld, Nether, and End.

![Dungeons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb4327bf500e94a60de828eafdc3eee4bc54f220.png)

**Fight:**
Tons of new mobs including new undead and a whole tribe of Illagers. Also changing the combat while keeping it vanilla with Combat Nouveau.

![Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d885724120bc4d7eae06f1328d10f911cfaaa5ba.png)

**Gear Up:**
New armors and weapons ranging from simple gear for early game, to powerful End game gear that will change how you play.

![Armor And Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc9d1c992596b2e5a4e60a0dedc8824b8f831a03.png)

**_survive:_**
 you are a visitor, but you were not invited. they will stop at nothing to remove you.

 ![Death](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98e308b2017e9c4df30295ec09678dd1cc85813a.png)

_This is the modpack used in the gameplay series "The Broken RPG" from Mark The Menace (me) on YouTube._

### **_DISCLAIMER_**
**I did not create ANY of the mods, shaders, resource packs, etc used in this modpack. All mods rights belong to their rightful owners. I simply used them to create an experience. Please, support the original mod creators!**
